cancel.title: Cancel Work Creation?
cancel.message: Are you sure you want to cancel? All your progress will be lost.

error.openInBot: Please open the application from the Telegram Bot for the best experience.
error.browserAuth: If you prefer to work in a browser, you can use authorization via widget:

empty.noMatch: No tasks match your search criteria

empty.student: You don't have any assigned works
empty.noMatch: No works match your filter criteria

hint.student: Your teacher will assign work to you

creator.templateHint: This work will be created as a Template
creator.studentHint: This work will be created and sent to the Student
creator.noLessonsAvailable: No lessons available in the active contract
creator.noActiveContract: No active contract found for this student

delete.title: Delete Work
delete.confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this work? This action cannot be undone.

empty.noFolder: You don't have any templates without folder
empty.noTemplates: You haven't created any templates yet
empty.noMatch: No templates match your filter criteria
empty.noTemplatesInFolder: You don't have any templates in this folder

hint.adjust: Try adjusting your filters to find what you're looking for

folder.message: Are you sure you want to delete this folder? This action cannot be undone.
folder.moveTemplates: All templates in this folder will be moved to the root folder.
folder.deleteSubfolders: All subfolders in this folder will be deleted.

validation.titleLength: Title must be at most 100 characters
validation.descriptionLength: Description must be at most 1000 characters

tooltips.dragAndDrop: Drag-n-drop to copy, Click to open menu

hiddenText.title: Hidden Text
hiddenText.hint: Text field that students need to reveal by typing the correct answer or drag and drop an answer from "Draggable Answers" if the section is added to the task.

draggableAnswers.title: Draggable Answers
draggableAnswers.hint: Panel with randomly shuffled answers that students can drag and drop to a 'Hidden Text' field. You can pin the panel to make it visible while scrolling the page.

multipleChoice.title: Multiple Choice
multipleChoice.hint: Drop-down list with multiple options where students need to select the only one correct answer.

sortingOrdering.title: Sorting & Ordering Section
sortingOrdering.hint: Panel with cards that students can reorder. Can be vertical (for sentences) or horizontal (for words or letters).

studentsSection.title: Student Section
studentsSection.hint: Interactive section where students can write any text, record voice, attach images. Teacher can highlight text, and comment on the student's answers.

image.title: Image
image.hint: Upload, crop and insert an image into your task. You can select a file on your device, drag and drop file, or paste an image from clipboard in the editor.

audio.title: Audio
audio.hint: Add an audio that students can play directly in the task. You can select a file on your device or record your own voice.

embed.title: Embed Content
embed.hint: Add external web content in your task: YouTube, Wordwall, Google Docs, or any other website that supports iframe.

onboarding.intro: Let's discover the platform! You can skip any step and come back later or you can skip the onboarding and discover the platform on your own or watch the video.

inviteStudents.title: Invite Students
inviteStudents.description: Create a contract with a student.
inviteStudents.hint: You can invite as many students as you want. Please find all your students in the "Students" section.

manageBalance.title: Manage Students balance
manageBalance.description: Add lessons on the Student's balance (optional).
manageBalance.hint: You can add / use lessons on the Student's balance to deal with accounting. Please find all transactions in the "Transactions" section.

createTasks.title: Create Tasks
createTasks.description: Create Tasks to include in a Work
createTasks.hint: You can create as many tasks as you want. Task may be included in a Work for a Student. Please find all tasks in the "Tasks" section.

assignWorks.title: Assign Works to Students
assignWorks.description: Create Works for your Students or assign existing Template
assignWorks.hint: You can create Works and send it to your Student or create Template for future assignments. Works consist of Tasks created in the previous step. Please find all works in the "Works" section.

feedback.title: How would you rate this work?
feedback.placeholder: Share your thoughts about this work...

error.loadFailed: Failed to load work data. Please try again.

actions.dragAndDrop: Drag and drop an image here, or click to select
actions.uploadError: Failed to upload image. Please try again.

audio.title: Add Audio
audio.dragAndDrop: Drag and drop an audio file here, or click to select
audio.uploadError: Failed to upload audio. Please try again.

iframe.title: External Content
iframe.urlPlaceholder: Enter URL (e.g., YouTube, Wordwall, Google Docs)

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.placeholder: Ask AI to help you with your task...
ai.error: Failed to get AI response. Please try again.

unsavedChanges.title: Unsaved Changes
unsavedChanges.message: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to continue editing?

cancel.title: Cancel Changes
cancel.message: Do you want to cancel changes? All unsaved changes will be lost.

validation.textOnlyInComponent: Text only allowed inside a component, change cursor position

invite.title: Invite Student
invite.description: The student needs to join our Telegram bot first. Share this link with them:
invite.shareText: Join our Telegram Bot to start learning!

hint.title: Need a hint?
hint.message: Would you like to see the answer or try to solve it yourself?

essay.textOnlyInComment: Text only allowed inside a comment

empty.hint: You need to create a contract with a student before you can assign work
empty.teacher: You haven't any active contracts yet
empty.noMatch: No contracts match your filter criteria
empty.createFirst: Start by creating a contract with your students
empty.studentHint: Your teacher will create a contract with you
empty.adjustFilters: Try adjusting your filters to find what you're looking for

existingContract.title: Contract Already Exists
existingContract.message: You can have only one active contract with a student. Please edit the existing contract instead of creating a new one.

archive.title: Archive Contract
archive.message: Are you sure you want to archive this contract? This action rejects the contract, but the teacher will still be able to offer you a new contract.

reject.title: Reject and Block Teacher
reject.message: Are you sure you want to reject and block this teacher forever? This action will Block the teacher to prevent future contract offers from him.

validation.taskNotFound: Task not found. Please refresh the page.
validation.noInternet: No internet connection. Please check your network.
validation.updateFailed: Failed to update task status. Please try again.

delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete the tag "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

hint.teacher: Start by creating a transaction for a contract

empty.adjustFilters: Try adjusting your filters to find what you're looking for

validation.lessonsOrAmount: Either number of lessons or amount and currency must be provided

unauthorized.title: Access Denied
unauthorized.message: You don't have permission to access this page. Please contact your administrator if you believe this is an error.
